GenAiFunction.description:
Explore Standard and Custom SObjects in the org (Account, Opportunity, custom __c objects). Use BEFORE QueryRecordsWithSoql whenever custom object or field names are involved — never guess them.
Scopes: - "summary": list available objects. Always start here when the object name is uncertain. - "details": fields, types, picklist values for one object. Only when the object is known to exist. - "relationships": how one object connects to others. Useful before writing SOQL with sub-queries or parent references.
NOT for Data Cloud entities (names ending in __dlm, __dll, __cio) — use ExploreDataCloud for those. Data Cloud entities are invisible to this action.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: My Org Butler: Explore Org Schema
